title: cyrtandra polyneura
intro: Cyrtandra polyneura is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Pacific Islands, specifically found in the tropical regions of Fiji and Samoa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Cyrtandra polyneura include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Cyrtandra polyneura include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or applying the plant's extract directly to the affected area.
